description_long: This is a four-door police car with a classic sedan shape, featuring a predominantly white body with a black rear section and roof. The sides of the vehicle are marked with bold black 'LCPD' lettering, and the rear displays 'LCPD POLICE' in large white letters. The roof is equipped with a blue and red emergency light bar, and the windows are tinted dark. The car has standard black wheels and side mirrors, and the front grille is simple and unadorned. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear law enforcement identifiers and a robust, functional build.
description: A white and black police sedan marked 'LCPD' with a roof-mounted emergency light bar and bold police identifiers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, windshield, and roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'LCPD' text, four doors, and the black-and-white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying 'LCPD POLICE' markings and the black rear section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'LCPD' text and visible emergency lights on the roof.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has 'LCPD' in large black block letters on both side doors and 'LCPD POLICE' in white on the rear trunk. The markings are bold, sans-serif, and highly visible against the contrasting body colors.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with blue and red lights, rectangular in shape, is centrally placed on the roof.
